## Checklist
- [ ] `bunx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `bunx oxlint@latest --deny-warnings` passes
- [ ] `bunx vitest run` passes (new logic has tests)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or PII committed
- [ ] Respects project memory rules (Luna neutrality, "No Continue" copy, no voice, real photography only)
- [ ] RLS policies reviewed if touching Supabase tables
- [ ] Mobile layout verified for UI changes
